description: PROP-EPNS-013 specifies Clock.now() call count per path: same-note=1. The pipeline tests verify clock counts for idle (1), empty (2), and dirty-fail (1) paths, but no test verifies that the same-note path calls Clock.now() exactly once. The PROP-EPNS-019 test (pipeline.test.ts:548-573) verifies the timestamp value but does not count calls. A spy counting clockNow calls should assert exactly 1 on the same-note path.
